preferred_name_ml.fr: Jauge de pression différentielle à joint à diaphragme

definition: differential pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element

definition_ml.en: differential pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element
definition_ml.fr: jauge de pression différentielle équipée d'un joint à diaphragme qui isole l'instrument de mesure du milieu du processus mais qui transmet les effets de la pression à son élément de détection
definition_ml.de: Differenzdruckmanometer, das mit einer Membranabdichtung ausgestattet ist, die das Messgerät vom Prozessmedium isoliert, jedoch Druckauswirkung auf seinen Messgrößenaufnehmer überträgt

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: differential pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element
raw_properties.MDC_P004.fr: Jauge de pression différentielle à joint à diaphragme
